MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO STRIKE THE CLAIM OF BORIS POLYAK. Appearances: Pamela A. Underwood of the Office of the District Attorney (551.9544) for petitioner and moving party. No other appearances.
